buckets.note: score cutpoints for buckets 0..5; bucket = count of cutpoints a score clears. Fit from graded human labels via an isotonic score->human mapping binned on human_edges_0_10. English only. The two bottom cutpoints (buckets 0->1, 1->2) are re-derived from the negative group (word-level errors): the human-labeled set's low end is flat so isotonic pins them to 0 and buckets 0-1 are unreachable; they are set from the p33/p67 percentiles of 9 negative scores. Only scores in the negative cluster change bucket; good speech is unaffected.
